description_long: This object is a straight, elongated section of road with a slightly trapezoidal cross-section, wider at the base and narrower at the top. The surface is dark, resembling asphalt or tarmac, and features a single dashed white line running down the center, indicating a two-way traffic lane. The road edges are clean and lack any visible curbs or sidewalks, giving it a streamlined appearance. There are no visible road signs, lighting fixtures, or pedestrian crossings present on or near the road. The texture appears slightly rough, consistent with typical urban road surfaces, and the color is predominantly a deep charcoal or black. The object is solid and flat, suitable for vehicular or pedestrian traversal.
description: A straight, dark asphalt road segment with a single dashed white center line and no curbs, signage, or crossings. The surface is slightly rough and flat, ideal for urban traffic.
description_view_0: End view showing the trapezoidal profile, with the road surface and central dashed line visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the road, highlighting the dashed center line and flat surface.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, mirroring view 0, showing the trapezoidal profile and central dashed line.
description_view_3: Side view identical to view 1, showing the road's length and dashed center line.
attribute_lane_markings: One dashed white center line, no additional markings or special lanes.
